metadata.title: Raíces & Returnings - Ashley & Oly
metadata.description: A space for the stories we carry, the ones we're still learning how to tell, and the ones we're finally ready to live. Reflections on identity, queerness, healing, spirituality, and home. Recipes passed down and reimagined.
metadata.keywords: Ashley & Oly, Raíces & Returnings, queerness, identity, healing, spirituality, recipes, migration, Venezuelan food, LGBTQ+, blog, reflections, culture, home, storytelling

footer.newsletter-desc: Beyond writing, Raíces & Returnings offers optional community spaces for those wanting deeper connection, shared language, and guided integration.<title>Community editions include:</title><list><item>Ongoing reflective prompts</item><item>Scripture reframed through love</item><item>Monthly live gatherings</item><item>Shared space with others rebuilding faith honestly</item></list>
footer.brand-desc: A digital space for the stories we carry and the ones we are still learning how to tell. Celebrating identity, queerness, healing, and the recipes that bring us home.

Home.title: Welcome to
Home.subtitle: Raíces & Returnings
Home.hero-description: A space for people rebuilding faith, identity, and belonging after inherited belief systems no longer fit.
Home.intro-lead: Raíces & Returnings is a digital home for reflection, spiritual integration, and honest language.
Home.paragraph-description: It exists for those navigating faith deconstruction, queerness, cultural identity, and the slow work of becoming whole.
Home.paragraph-description-two: Here you'll find weekly reflections, honest language, and grounded spirituality—for people rebuilding reverence toward themselves, the divine, and their humanity.
Home.find-blurb: Everything we've been tending — take what your moment needs.
Home.find-item-1-desc: Essays to think, question, and come back to ground.
Home.find-item-2-desc: Small digital books to practice at your own pace.
Home.find-item-3-desc: Phrases and voices to accompany you in the everyday.
Home.find-item-4: Resources for rebuilding faith beyond dogma
Home.find-item-4-desc: Language and prayer beyond inherited religion.
Home.find-item-5-desc: Live gatherings for those who want to walk accompanied.
Home.manifesto-title: An edition for those returning to themselves, slowly.
Home.manifesto-pillar-1-desc: Stories, tools, and exercises for your process of personal reconstruction.
Home.manifesto-pillar-2-desc: No dogma, no judgment. Only deep content, real integration, and space to be yourself.
Home.manifesto-pillar-3-desc: You are not alone. Here you find a safe space to return to yourself, in community.
Home.fresh-title-one: New reflections. New language. Same intention.
Home.fresh-title-two: Stay a while. Take what you need.
Home.paragraph-fresh: Recent essays, affirmations, and digital editions designed to support your journey—whether you’re questioning, rebuilding, or beginning again.
Home.book-blurb-start: A guided workbook to help you
Home.book-blurb-end: for your own becoming—away from inherited fear, and back toward the sacred in you.
Home.book-empty: Our next edition is on its way. Sign up below to be the first to know.
Home.sidebar-cta-desc: Stories, affirmations, and reflections—straight to your inbox, once a week.

metadata.title: About Ashley & Oly | Raíces & Returnings
metadata.description: Meet Ashley León & Oly Contreras — the queer, Venezuelan-American voices behind Raíces & Returnings. Stories of identity, faith, migration, and home.

About.title: About Raíces & Returnings
About.intro:
Raíces & Returnings was created to hold what doesn’t fit neatly into categories—faith that’s been fractured, identity that’s been fragmented, spirituality that refuses fear.

This space exists for people learning how to return to themselves without abandoning their questions, bodies, or stories. It is writing-led, reflection-based, and rooted in lived experience—not performance or perfection.
About.introduction-paragraph: Two voices, one home. Rooted in different lands, shaped by survival, stitched together by healing. We created Raíces & Returnings to hold everything that never fit neatly into categories— love that defies scripts, food that carries memory, queerness that feels holy, and stories that don't end where they began. It's part blog, part kitchen table, part altar. A little messy. Deeply honest. And always real.
About.description-paragraph-oly:
Oly is part of the heart behind Raíces & Returnings.

Born in Venezuela and shaped by migration, resilience, and lived wisdom, she brings grounding, humor, and perspective into this space. While she isn’t the primary content creator, her presence influences the tone, the truth-telling, and the way this platform understands home, memory, and survival.

At times, she may share reflections or recipes rooted in culture and memory—but always as part of the larger story we’re living.
About.description-paragraph-ashley:
I’m Ashley—writer, conscious digital creator, and facilitator of reflective space. My life has been shaped in the in-between: between cultures, between belief systems, between certainty and doubt.

I’ve lived deeply inside religion—and then had to learn how to leave it without losing my reverence for God, self, or meaning. My work now exists at that intersection: spirituality beyond dogma, faith without fear, and integration instead of erasure.

Through essays, affirmations, guided journals, and community spaces, I create language for people learning how to live whole—without self-abandonment. Most of what you’ll encounter here is my voice, my writing, and my lived experience, shared with honesty and care.
About.conclusion:
Together, Raíces & Returnings is a space built from real life, <nowrap>not aspiration.</nowrap>
It holds grief and reverence.
Unlearning and returning.
Humanity and divinity, side by side.
We’re glad you’re here.

metadata.title: Heritage Recipes — Venezuelan & Latin American Cooking | Raíces & Returnings
metadata.description: Venezuelan and Latin American heritage recipes by Oly Contreras. Traditional dishes passed down and reimagined with love, memory, and cultural pride.

metadata.title: Blog — Reflections on Identity, Faith & Healing | Raíces & Returnings
metadata.description: Essays and reflections on faith deconstruction, queerness, cultural identity, and the slow work of becoming whole. By Ashley León & Oly Contreras.

metadata.title: Contact Us | Raíces & Returnings
metadata.description: Have a question, collaboration idea, or something to share? Reach out to Ashley & Oly at Raíces & Returnings. We'd love to hear from you.

Contact.title: Want to reach out?
Contact.paragraph: Whether you have a question, a collaboration idea, or something you need to say—we’d love to hear from you. This is a living, breathing platform. Your voice matters here.

Email.subject: Thanks for reaching out to Raíces & Returnings 🌿
Email.title: Thank you for being here.
Email.brandMessage: We're Ashley & Oly, the voices and hearts behind Raíces & Returnings. This space was born from our stories—stories of migration, memory, queerness, healing, and home. It's a space where recipes carry history, reflections hold truth, and even the merch is made with meaning. Here's what you'll find in our little corner of the internet:
Email.list-one: 🥄 Recipes rooted in culture and love
Email.list-two: 📝 Blogs that reflect on identity, spirituality, and growth
Email.list-three: 🛍 Merch designed with intention (and a lot of corazón)
Email.response-message: We're so glad you reached out. Whether you had a question, an idea, or just wanted to say hi—your presence here matters to us. We're building a community, not a following. Thanks for being part of it. We'll get back to you as soon as we can.
Email.footer-text: This email was sent because you contacted us through our website.

Privacy.title: Privacy Policy
Privacy.intro: At Raíces & Returnings, we value your privacy. This policy explains what information we collect, how we use it, and the choices you have regarding your data when you visit our site or use our services.

informationCollected.title: 1. Information we collect
informationCollected.body:
We may collect information you provide directly, such as your name, email address, and message content when you contact us or subscribe to our newsletter.

We may also collect basic technical data such as browser type, visited pages, and date/time of access to improve the site experience.

howWeUse.title: 2. How we use your information
howWeUse.body: We use your information to: (a) respond to inquiries, (b) send communications you requested, (c) process purchases or digital deliveries when applicable, and (d) improve the site's content, performance, and security.

sharing.title: 3. Data sharing
sharing.body: We do not sell your personal information. We may share data with service providers that help us operate the site (for example payment, hosting, analytics, or email services) under confidentiality obligations and only to provide those services.

cookies.title: 4. Cookies and similar technologies
cookies.body: We may use cookies or similar technologies to remember preferences, measure traffic, and improve functionality. You can manage cookie settings in your browser, though some site features may be affected.

security.title: 5. Information security
security.body: We apply reasonable administrative, technical, and organizational safeguards to protect your information. However, no method of transmission or storage is 100% secure, so we cannot guarantee absolute security.

rights.title: 6. Your rights and choices
rights.body: Depending on your jurisdiction, you may have rights to request access, correction, update, or deletion of your personal data, and to withdraw consent where applicable. To exercise these rights, contact us using the email listed in this policy.

children.title: 7. Children's privacy
children.body: This site is not intentionally directed to children under the age defined by applicable law. If you believe a minor has provided personal data to us, contact us so we can review and take appropriate action.

intlTransfers.title: 8. International transfers
intlTransfers.body: Your data may be processed in countries other than your own, where data protection laws may differ. Where appropriate, we implement reasonable safeguards to protect transferred information.

changes.title: 9. Changes to this policy
changes.body: We may update this policy from time to time to reflect legal, technical, or operational changes. We will post the current version on this page and indicate the latest update date.

contact.title: 10. Contact
contact.body: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy or how your data is handled, you can contact us at:

Terms.title: Terms and Conditions
Terms.intro: By accessing and using this website, you agree to these Terms and Conditions. If you do not agree, please do not use the site.

acceptance.title: 1. Acceptance of terms
acceptance.body: These terms govern your use of the site and services offered by Raíces & Returnings. By browsing, signing up, subscribing, or purchasing, you confirm that you have read and accepted these terms.

useOfSite.title: 2. Permitted use of the site
useOfSite.body: You agree to use the site lawfully and respectfully. You must not engage in activities that impact the site's security, availability, or operation, or attempt unauthorized access to systems or data.

intellectualProperty.title: 3. Intellectual property
intellectualProperty.body: Unless otherwise stated, site content (text, images, brand assets, design, and resources) belongs to Raíces & Returnings or their respective owners. You may not copy, distribute, or commercially exploit this content without prior written authorization.

userConduct.title: 4. User conduct
userConduct.body: You may not post or send unlawful, offensive, defamatory, fraudulent content, or content that infringes third-party rights. We reserve the right to restrict access or remove content that violates these terms.

purchases.title: 5. Purchases and payments
purchases.body: When making purchases, you agree to provide accurate and complete information. Payments are processed through third-party providers. Delivery times, access, and use of digital products may be subject to specific conditions shown during checkout.

thirdParty.title: 6. Third-party links and services
thirdParty.body: The site may include links to third-party platforms or services. We do not control those sites and are not responsible for their content, policies, or practices. We recommend reviewing their terms and policies before use.

disclaimers.title: 7. Disclaimers
disclaimers.body: Site content is provided for general informational and educational purposes. It does not constitute legal, medical, psychological, financial, or other professional advice.

liability.title: 8. Limitation of liability
liability.body: To the fullest extent permitted by applicable law, Raíces & Returnings is not liable for indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages arising from use of, or inability to use, the site.

indemnification.title: 9. Indemnification
indemnification.body: You agree to defend and indemnify Raíces & Returnings against claims, losses, or expenses arising from your breach of these terms or misuse of the site.

termination.title: 10. Termination
termination.body: We may suspend or terminate access to the site, in whole or in part, if we detect misuse, breach of these terms, or for justified operational reasons.

governingLaw.title: 11. Governing law
governingLaw.body: These terms are interpreted under the applicable law of the jurisdiction corresponding to the site owner, unless mandatory legal provisions state otherwise.

changes.title: 12. Changes to the terms
changes.body: We may update these terms when necessary. The updated version will be published on this page with its effective date. Continued use of the site means acceptance of the changes.

contact.title: 13. Contact
contact.body: If you have questions about these Terms and Conditions, you can contact us at:
